title: balsaminaceae
intro: The balsaminaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of plants that includes the genus Impatiens, also known as balsam. Balsaminaceae is a small family of about 120 species of annuals and perennials. These plants are native to the Old World and are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. They are known for their bright, showy flowers and are often cultivated as ornamental plants.
